title: Monitoring: NetFlow Exporter (UDP 2055), SPAN Session 11, IP SLA Schedule
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: Complete the Flexible NetFlow Flow Exporter configuration on R1 to send data to the collector using UDP port 2055.
Configure the switch port analyzer on Sw1 and mirror all communication to and from PC1 to interface E1/1 using session number 11.
Schedule the pre-configured IP SLA operation on R1 to start running immediately and to run indefinitely.

required.line: monitor session 11 source interface Ethernet0/1 both
ip sla schedule 100 life forever start-time now

hints: R1'de 'show flow exporter' ile exporter adının Export-NetFlowENCOR olup olmadığını doğrula; farklıysa ön-config'teki gerçek adı kullan.
R1'de 'show run | sec sla' ile önceden tanımlı SLA ID'nin 100 olup olmadığını doğrula; farklıysa gerçek ID'yi kullan.
answer_key_raw:
R1:
R1> enable
R1# configure terminal
R1(config)# flow exporter Export-NetFlowENCOR
R1(config-flow-exporter)# destination 10.10.1.1
R1(config-flow-exporter)# transport udp 2055
R1(config-flow-exporter)# exit
R1(config)# ip sla schedule 100 life forever start-time now
R1(config)# end
R1# write

Sw1:
Sw1> enable
Sw1# configure terminal
Sw1(config)# monitor session 11 source interface e0/1 both
Sw1(config)# monitor session 11 destination interface e1/1
Sw1(config)# end
Sw1# write
explanation: Flow exporter'da collector'a hangi UDP portuyla gönderileceği 'transport udp 2055' ile belirlenir; collector IP'si 'destination' satırıdır. SPAN'de yalnızca PC1 isteniyor → tek kaynak port (e0/1) 'both' yönüyle verilir, hedef e1/1'dir. Önceden tanımlı IP SLA operasyonu 'ip sla schedule <ID> life forever start-time now' ile hemen ve süresiz başlatılır.
